text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I did everything I could to prepare for today...
and I trained so hard... but it still wasn't enough...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Trainer... You helped me so much, and
yet I...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maybe winning is too far out of reach for
someone as mediocre as me...
choice_data_list: Do you want to give up, then?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I knew from the beginning that making my dream
come true wasn't going to be easy!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sorry for being so whiny. I'm fine now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I know I keep losing, but I'm going to do my
absolute best to change that, so please stay with
me and keep guiding me onward!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: N-no! Absolutely not! I don't want to give up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I still have a goal to achieve, so no matter how
miserable I feel, I won't stop running!
choice_data_list:
Your strong willpower is what makes you
special.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to work even harder than before. I'll do
my best to improve my training plans as well.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I won't give up, so please stay with me and guide
me onward!
